description: Typed record store + hybrid search over MCP: deterministic lookups + semantic memory, per-customer.
name: io.github.vectros-ai/mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Vectros API key. Use a least-privilege scoped key (ssk_...); mint one with `npx -y @vectros-ai/cli bootstrap`. Required for a registry install, which cannot assume any other tooling is present. If you also install the vectros CLI (0.9.0+), the server can instead resolve the key from its keyring and this can be left unset.
environmentVariables.name: VECTROS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional. When VECTROS_API_KEY is unset and the vectros CLI is installed, resolve this keyring entry instead of the active one.
environmentVariables.name: VECTROS_KEYRING_ALIAS

environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (default https://api.vectros.ai). Must be an official *.vectros.ai host.
environmentVariables.name: VECTROS_API_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated subset of tool names to register (default: all 21 tools).
environmentVariables.name: VECTROS_MCP_TOOLS
